title: Add stable public screenshots and onboarding documentation

acceptance_criteria.text: Provide a stable, repeatable screenshot process: a deterministic demo-state generator plus a headless capture script, documented so the images can be regenerated consistently.
evidence: scripts/demo-state.mjs (npm run demo:state) — seeded LearnerState from real content; dates float, content selection stable
scripts/screenshots.mjs (npm run screenshots) — Playwright capture at 1440x900@2x, auto-generates demo state if missing
docs/screenshots/README.md documents the process and shot list; demo-state.json git-ignored as a regenerated intermediate

acceptance_criteria.text: Refresh the public screenshots to show the multi-track product (resolving the release-readiness audit follow-up) and the newer views, and reference them from the README.
evidence: docs/screenshots/01..08 regenerated incl. track switcher, Performance objective heatmap, and the multi-select format
README screenshot section updated with multi-track switcher, performance, and multi-select shots

acceptance_criteria.text: Add onboarding documentation: an end-user getting-started guide and a contributor onboarding guide.
evidence: docs/getting-started.md — install/first run, track choice, study loop, backups, first-week plan
docs/contributor-onboarding.md — repo map, dev loop, validation gates, adding content/tracks; linked from CONTRIBUTING.md

acceptance_criteria.text: Add an in-app first-run onboarding walkthrough, shown once on a fresh install and replayable from Preferences.
evidence: src/App.tsx Onboarding component: 4-step dialog, keyboard navigable, dismiss persists skillforge-onboarded flag
Shows only on a genuinely fresh install; replay button in Preferences
Browser-verified: steps navigate, Get started/Skip dismiss + persist, no reappear on reload, replay reopens
